items.text: Leverage Automated data integration pipelines built in a low-code environment to connect all your data, eliminating data silos to achieve faster & real-time insights.

Connect your data from 100+ sources, apply data cleaning, transformation, munging and wrangling to shape your data in the desired structure, and load into a target destination to unlock actionable insights and enable reliable & real-time, data-driven decision making.

paragraphs: Leverage Automated data integration pipelines built in a low-code environment to connect all your data, eliminating data silos to achieve faster & real-time insights.

items.text: Join Us on the Journey Towards Success
Ingest your data from a vast library of 100+ pre-built data connectors and custom API integration capabilities.
Securely load your transformed data into any target destination type such as database, data warehouse, flat file, or tree files.
Carry out data wrangling, massaging, and mapping to transform your data into the desired shape & format

items.text: Our expert consultants will guide you through the entire process from start to finish. We will work with you to optimize your existing data pipelines or build new ones. Our Consulting services include selecting suitable tools, assisting in developing data pipelines, and building a data integration strategy. TALK TO AN EXPERT > >

We work as your partners and implement your customized data integration solution. We set up your ETL pipelines on Azure, apply data transformations, and map to the target destination while ensuring data security. TALK TO AN EXPERT > >

Migrate data from a wide range of sources to Azure, including on-premises databases, cloud storage, SaaS applications, and between different Azure services. We help you migrate your data from one location to another with ease, without having to disrupt your business as usual. Cut down on redundant data and efficiently migrate from on-premise to cloud-based storage while minimizing infrastructure cost. TALK TO AN EXPERT > >

items.text: Benefits of Data Integration As A Service?
Automate execution and management of your integration processes saves time and money.
Get a highly scalable solution that can adapt to the needs of your company, regardless of the size or scope of the data volume.
Connect all your organizational data to help in smooth collaboration & increase productivity.
Effortlessly manage your data in a centralized location with robust data security practices
Centralized data management ensures higher data quality and consistency
Get processed, transformed, and cleaned data to speedily extract actionable insights.

items.text: Folio3’s Data Integration As A Service Key Capabilities
Integrate your data on cloud in a low-code environment without having to invest heavily in hardware and software.
Connect your company-wide data with an extensive library of pre-built connectors, API integration, and more.
Schedule your integration pipelines to run on pre-specified times to save time on mundane tasks.
Ensure your data stays up-to-date and your teams remain agile through automated, low-code, real-time data synchronization.
Quickly and easily integrate, clean and transform data from different sources for use in BI tools such as Power BI, Tableau, etc.
Create automated data pipelines to orchestrate repetitive & complex workflows to enhance efficiency & accuracy while reducing costs by automating manual tasks.
Apply robust data quality rules in your data integration pipelines to ensure adherence to company guidelines and maintain data integrity.
Prepare data by applying data wrangling, cleaning, filtering, and mapping to construct a robust ETL/ELT pipeline, code-free.
Manage & govern your data, including data lineage, data quality, business policies, and data security.

items.text: We believe in the power of the cloud to transform businesses and empower people.

An Azure Consultant provides expert guidance and advice to organizations looking to adopt and use Microsoft Azure Cloud services. They help clients assess their business requirements and design a solution that best fits their needs, ensuring a smooth transition to the cloud.

Microsoft provides a wide range of cloud services under the Azure Cloud Services umbrella, including Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS), Platform as a Service (PaaS), and Software as a Service (SaaS). The services offered range from virtual machines, storage, networking, databases, and web services to advanced analytics, artificial intelligence, and Internet of Things (IoT) solutions.

Azure DevOps is a suite of services for managing the entire application development life cycle. It includes services like Azure Boards for project management, Azure Pipelines for continuous integration and delivery, Azure Test Plans for automated testing, and Azure Artifacts for package management.

Azure Cloud Services pricing varies based on the type and amount of services used. It offers both pay-as-you-go and subscription-based pricing models. Additionally, Microsoft provides free services for some of its Azure offerings, such as Azure DevOps and Azure Kubernetes Service.

paragraphs: We believe in the power of the cloud to transform businesses and empower people.

An Azure Consultant provides expert guidance and advice to organizations looking to adopt and use Microsoft Azure Cloud services. They help clients assess their business requirements and design a solution that best fits their needs, ensuring a smooth transition to the cloud.

Microsoft provides a wide range of cloud services under the Azure Cloud Services umbrella, including Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS), Platform as a Service (PaaS), and Software as a Service (SaaS). The services offered range from virtual machines, storage, networking, databases, and web services to advanced analytics, artificial intelligence, and Internet of Things (IoT) solutions.

Azure DevOps is a suite of services for managing the entire application development life cycle. It includes services like Azure Boards for project management, Azure Pipelines for continuous integration and delivery, Azure Test Plans for automated testing, and Azure Artifacts for package management.

Azure Cloud Services pricing varies based on the type and amount of services used. It offers both pay-as-you-go and subscription-based pricing models. Additionally, Microsoft provides free services for some of its Azure offerings, such as Azure DevOps and Azure Kubernetes Service.
